title: Garlicky Samphire Gratin
description: A rich and flavorful side dish that showcases the delicate taste of samphire. Perfect for accompanying a hearty Irish dinner.
instructions: Trim the samphire to 5cm lengths and blanch in boiling water for 3-5 minutes, or until tender.
Drain the samphire and set aside.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the milk, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
In a greased baking dish, arrange a layer of samphire.
Pour some of the cheese sauce over the samphire.
Repeat the layers until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
